title: August 25
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}
'''August 25''' is the 237th day of the year (238th in leap years). There are 128 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1941|1941]] – [[Dan Hennessey]] is born.
*[[1940s#1944|1944]] – [[Anthony Heald]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Bob Fingerman]] is born.
*[[1982]] – [[Ben Diskin]] is born.
*[[1999]] – [[Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... 6|''Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago...'' 6]] published.
*1999 – [[Star Wars (1998) 9|''Republic 9: Outlander, Part 3'']] published.
*[[2004]] – [[Republic 68|''Republic'' 68]] published.
*[[2006]] – [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 6|''Clone Wars Adventures: Volume 6'']] published.
*[[2010]] – [[Blood Ties 1|''Blood Ties: A Tale of Jango and Boba Fett'' 1]] published.
*[[2014]] – "[[Entanglement]]" short is uploaded on YouTube.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Jedi Academy: Attack of the Journal]]'' published.
*2015 – [[LEGO Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (Scholastic)|''LEGO Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith'']] young readers book published.
*[[2020]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Stories of Light and Dark]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader - Dark Lord of the Sith Vol. 2]]'' published.
*2020 – [[The Rise of Skywalker (Little Golden Book)|''The Rise of Skywalker'' Little Golden Book]] published.
*2020 – [[Darth Vader (reference book)|''Darth Vader'']] published in Spanish.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Disney Gallery: The Mandalorian: Making of the Season 2 Finale]]'' premieres on Disney+.
*2021 – [[Darth Vader (2020) 15|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 15]] published.
*2021 – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 13|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 13]] published.
*2021 – [[2021 Topps Star Wars Chrome Galaxy]] released.
*[[2022]] – [[THE TWINS (manga)|''The Twins'']] manga adaptation published in Japan.
*[[2023]] – "[[The Ganguls / Bad Eggs]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].

<noinclude>
